series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the design and construction of statefunded highway construction projects. This series may include, but is not limited to: designs, surveys, studies, and field inspections.

retention_rules.disposition: 3 Years after project completion, Non-confidential Destruction

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the design, construction, and administration of projects funded through the Federal Highway Administration (FHWA). This series may include, but is not limited to: designs, surveys, field inspections, and correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: 3 Years after final payment, Non-confidential Destruction
